ast.source: This aims to imitate well-known iA Writer paragraph focus.

ast.name: text
ast.source: If you notice any issues, try to update to the latest version and reload Obsidian.
ast.target: 如果您发现任何问题，请尝试更新到最新版本并重新加载 Obsidian。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Otherwise feel free to bring it up on Github or better yet contribute a fix.
ast.target: 否则，请随时在 Github 上提出问题，或者更好的是，贡献一个修复方案。
